name: mcache
explanation: Memcached speaks a well-known text/binary protocol on port 11211; the check connects via bmemcached and issues stats commands. Required configuration is just url (host) and an optional port that defaults to 11211. Authentication via username/password is supported but optional and rarely deployed (default Memcached has no auth). The shipped auto_conf.yaml templates url=%%host%% with port 11211, confirming Autodiscovery already works generically. Discovery via TCP banner probe matches procedure pattern C.
notes: Same shape as redisdb. SASL-authenticated deployments would fall through; rare in practice.
